title: Takeda's Zasocitinib Beats BMS Sotyktu in Phase 3
headline: Takeda's zasocitinib tops Bristol Myers Squibb's Sotyktu in head-to-head Phase 3 trial for plaque psoriasis, potentially reshaping the $4B+ TYK2 market.
key_facts: $4B+ TYK2 market opportunity; head-to-head Phase 3 in plaque psoriasis; zasocitinib vs. deucravacitinib

title: Summit Therapeutics Pulls $500M Share Offering
headline: Summit Therapeutics withdraws its $500M stock offering just one day after announcement, citing deteriorating market conditions amid 4.2% YoY CPI inflation.
key_facts: $500M share offering withdrawn; May CPI 4.2% YoY; fed-hike odds surging

title: Novartis RNA Drug from $12B Avidity Deal Wins Trial
headline: Novartis reports positive biomarker data for RNA-based therapy acquired via ~$12B Avidity Biosciences acquisition in muscular dystrophy.
key_facts: ~$12B Avidity acquisition; muscular dystrophy indication; biomarker data positive

title: Genentech Lays Off VPs, Closes Infectious Disease Unit
headline: Genentech dismisses 3 VPs including legendary immunologist Vishva Dixit and reportedly shuts down its infectious disease research unit.
key_facts: 3 VPs dismissed; Vishva Dixit included; infectious disease research unit closed

title: Kardigan Sets IPO Terms at $320M–$373M+
headline: Cardiac drugmaker Kardigan sets IPO pricing at $320M–$373M+, positioning as the 13th biotech IPO of 2026.
key_facts: IPO target $320M–$373M+; cardiac focus; 13th biotech IPO of 2026

title: Camurus Receives Second CRL for Acromegaly Drug
headline: Camurus receives a second Complete Response Letter from the FDA for its acromegaly drug, signaling serious manufacturing or clinical concerns.
key_facts: Second CRL; acromegaly indication; repeat FDA rejection

title: Teva Details Workforce Reduction Plan
headline: Teva Pharmaceutical outlines specifics of its workforce reduction plan.

title: Sensorion Drops Hearing Loss Gene Therapy
headline: Sensorion ends OTOF-related hearing loss gene therapy development after strategic review cites intensified competition from Regeneron.
key_facts: OTOF gene therapy discontinued; Regeneron competitive pressure; development environment 'notably changed'

title: J&J Data Support Imaavy Anemic Disorder Expansion
headline: Johnson & Johnson presents clinical data positioning Imaavy for label expansion into an anemic disorder indication.
key_facts: Imaavy label expansion; anemic disorder; clinical data positive

title: Ethyreal Launches with $101M for Thyroid Eye Disease
headline: Ethyreal launches with $101M in funding to develop differentiated medicine for thyroid eye disease and Graves' disease.
key_facts: $101M funding; thyroid eye disease (TED) and Graves' disease; differentiated mechanism

title: Novo Nordisk CEO Calls for Competitive Push
headline: Novo Nordisk CEO Mike Doustdar calls for company to 'become more competitive' in new interview.
key_facts: CEO Mike Doustdar; competitive positioning statement

title: Novo Nordisk Data Breach Reported
headline: Novo Nordisk reports data breach, urging patients to remain vigilant.
key_facts: Data breach disclosed; patient notification issued

title: Astellas CEO Outlines Xtandi Patent Cliff Strategy
headline: Astellas CEO outlines strategy to offset looming patent expiration of blockbuster prostate cancer drug Xtandi.
key_facts: Xtandi patent cliff; prostate cancer; revenue protection strategy

title: SonoThera Raises $125M for Gene Therapy
headline: SonoThera raises $125M for non-viral gene therapy platform development.

title: City Therapeutics Raises $99M for RNAi
headline: City Therapeutics raises $99M to advance three RNAi medicines in development.

title: Neion Bio Lands $23M Series A Funding
headline: Neion Bio secures $23M Series A to develop protein production platform using chicken eggs.
key_facts: $23M Series A; chicken egg-based protein platform
